title: Бездарная сборка
body:
# It's a **client side** version of our private server mod pack.
## You can use this modpack on any **Vanilla** server.

The main idea is enchanting the vanilla expirience.
And the main goal for this modpack is making installation more comfortable for the players of our private server.

## What to expect?

  -Comfortable keybinds.

  -Vanilla-friendly shaderpack.

  -Optimisation mods.

  -Good looking resource packs.

  -Customizable Player Models.

  -EmoteCraft(fork).

  -New shortcuts for keyboard players.

As you can see, there's nothing that changes vanilla blocks, items or tools.
Just the better version of multiplayer minecraft IMHO.
